root.label: Tasks
root.description: A small example to-do application used to demonstrate specrcheckr. Everything below is synthetic.

children.label: Sign up
children.description: Create an account with an email address and a password.

children.label: Log in
children.description: Email and password login, now with optional two-factor authentication (TOTP) via an authenticator app. Users can enroll a device under Settings; once enrolled, login requires a 6-digit code after the password step.

children.label: Password reset
children.description: Request a reset email and set a new password from a single-use link that expires after one hour.

children.label: Delete list
children.description: Delete a list and all of the tasks inside it.

children.label: Tasks
children.description: Create and manage tasks within a list.

children.label: Add task
children.description: Add a task with a title to a list.

children.label: Complete task
children.description: Mark a task as done; completed tasks move to a separate completed section.

children.label: Due dates
children.description: Set an optional due date on a task.

children.label: Reminders
children.description: Reminders send an email one hour before a task is due. Exact delivery timing and per-user timezone handling still need product confirmation.

children.label: Invite a collaborator
children.description: Invite a registered user by email to collaborate on a list with edit access.

children.label: Public share link
children.description: A read-only public link to a list. The link can be created and shared, but it cannot yet be revoked or set to expire.
